title: EnderIO - Refrubished!
description: A new interpretation of the textures of the Ender IO mod
body:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/M1lyCG5.png) 
---
![Machines](https://i.imgur.com/bcFpCET.png)

It's been over 10 years of EnderIO, without a doubt a mod that has left a big mark on the lives of modded Minecraft players, its exclusive mechanics, machine items and even the Conduits make us love this mod!

But it's been a while since the Ender IO textures were updated, so I present to you: EnderIO - Refrubished!

Ender IO refrubished tries to keep the original ideas of the EnderIO authors while bringing a new air of modernity to the mod, such as the ingots, they try to bring a modern idea
while basing themselves on the denser shading of Minecraft's programmer art!

## About
- [**Original Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderio)
- [**My Social Media**](https://linktr.ee/bl4ck_)
- Free for use in modpacks.
